candidateSnapshot.firstVerseAnchor: The Lord is on my head like a crown, and I shall not be without Him.
candidateSnapshot.lastVerseAnchor: For it is not like a withered crown which blossoms not; but Thou livest upon my head, and Thou hast blossomed upon my head.

sourceProbeSummary.sourceBasis: James Rendel Harris translation/source family identified by metadata and source probes
sourceProbeSummary.sourceShapeFinding: Available witnesses show a broader Odes corpus, while the candidate contains only Ode 1 with three rows.
sourceProbeSummary.diagnosticNote: The candidate's three rows are source-family compatible with observed Ode 1 witnesses, but the file is not a complete Odes of Solomon candidate and cannot be source-bound as the work.

finding.summary: The Odes of Solomon candidate is source-visible but fragmentary. It contains only Ode 1 with three rows, while available public witnesses contain a substantially larger Odes corpus. This is not safe for app rendering, textual trust, or complete source-binding collation.
localImplications: Do not claim Odes of Solomon source-binding collation.
Do not mutate the three-row candidate text from a source witness in this pass.
Do not mark Odes of Solomon app-render eligible.
Next work must decide whether to rebuild/replace the candidate from a complete governed public-domain source snapshot or retain this as a fragmentary excluded candidate.

nextAllowedWork: identify a complete public-domain James Rendel Harris Odes of Solomon source witness
record a local source snapshot before any row-level collation
decide whether the candidate should be rebuilt from the complete witness or retained as a fragmentary excluded candidate
only then attempt Odes of Solomon source binding
